source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL1_') AS vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL1_') AS vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL_12_') AS vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL_12_') AS vwPrisma_Enriched_Infra_DateFiltered_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'ValidatedData3_') AS tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'ValidatedData3_') AS tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL1__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_Prisma_ETL_12__sink_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'CARDB_PrismaCloudVulns' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3_') AS OLE_DB_Destination_ValidatedData3__sink_TableName;

Declare @inspectiondate date = (select max(import_date) from [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] ) Declare @PrevDate date = (select max(import_date) from [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] where Import_Date <@inspectiondate) select  A.UID, A.[DB_ID], @inspectiondate as ValidatedDate from  [dbo].[tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA] a left outer join [tbl_Prisma_Enriched_TCOO_TDATA]  b on a.UID = B.UID AND B.IMPORT_DATE = @inspectiondate where cast(A.import_date as date) = @PrevDate AND B.UID IS NULL
